summary: Reload active DFM pages when local method JSON changes on disk.
details: DFM tabs now watch the active local method JSON file and automatically apply external disk edits when the page is clean, so ArcBot or hand-edited JSON changes show in the GUI without reopening the tab.
Externally changed Ratios exclusion cells and Average Formula selection cells briefly flash blue after reload so users can see which GUI cells were changed by API editing.
If the DFM page has unsaved in-app edits, external disk changes do not overwrite the GUI state; the status bar warns the user to save or reload deliberately.
